item.title: I censored them because I don’t know their age, and their war crimes can be addressed when they are of age and have committed th...
item.description:
I censored them because I don’t know their age, and their war crimes can be addressed when they are of age and have committed them

item.title: Wow, I wonder why the country that hosts a bunch of other European countries to do government and it has Europeans in it?
item.description:
Wow, I wonder why the country that hosts a bunch of other European countries to do government and it has Europeans in it? I wonder why the city that host the European Parliament doesn’t just have one European country in it.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They are attempting to perform normalcy but they are in fact performing brutality
item.description:
They are attempting to perform normalcy but they are in fact performing brutality

item.title: Also most leftists voted for Kamala and the portion that didn’t , didn’t cost her the election
item.description:
Also most leftists voted for Kamala and the portion that didn’t , didn’t cost her the election. But none of this is in reality anyway, so one delusion at a time.
